对学习投入、动机、问题解决与学业成就均有显著提升

M02-2026-CYSR-Youth.title: Between promise and practice: a scoping review of the democratic outcomes of youth participation in local governance
key_claims: 48 项研究 24 国 scoping review：青年参与治理在个人/社区/政府三层皆有正负效应

M02-2025-medRxiv-CoCreation.title: Youth co-creation in health interventions: a systematic review and meta-analysis

key_claims: 工具应该具有低门槛和高天花板

key_claims: 8 条把 LLM 整合为「临时思考伙伴」而非「答案引擎」的设计原则

M05-2025-PMC-CogOffload.title: Generative AI tool use enhances academic achievement in sustainable education through shared metacognition and cognitive offloading among preservice teachers
key_claims: PLS-SEM 中介模型：GenAI 通过认知卸载与共享元认知提升学业成就
卸载简单任务释放认知资源以投入复杂任务
需配合显式的元认知反思以避免「全卸载」
M05-2025-PMC-CogOffload.notes: Scientific Reports 2025 - 准教师 GenAI 使用 PLS-SEM 中介模型

M05-2026-IJSTEM-CogScaffold.title: Tool, tutor, or crutch? A grounded theory of cognitive scaffolding and offloading in AI-assisted programming education
key_claims: 扎根理论模型：领域掌握 vs 工具掌握的张力 + 战略切换 + 信任难验证
脚手架 vs 卸载的双循环：脚手架降无关负载、保留有效负载；卸载两者皆降
专家逆转效应：新手的有用支持对专家成为冗余开销
M05-2026-IJSTEM-CogScaffold.notes: IJSTEM Education 2026 - AI 辅助编程的认知负载模型

M05-2025-Microsoft-CritThink.title: The impact of generative AI on critical thinking: Self-reported reductions in cognitive effort and confidence effects from a survey of knowledge workers
key_claims: 对 GenAI 信任度高时，使用者自报告的认知投入与批判性思维显著下降

需在工具使用规范中显式引入二次校验环节
M05-2025-Microsoft-CritThink.notes: Microsoft / CHI 2025 - 319 名知识工作者调查
